mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVS_AFFIRM_RULE ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, EVS_STEP, EVS_GROUP, RULE_ID, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsStep, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ruleId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},200, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_AFFIRM_RULE SET EVS_STEP = GET_CODE_NO(#{evsStep, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'14015060',#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'CODE'), EVS_GROUP = GET_CODE_NO(#{evsGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR},RESUME_SEQ,'GROUP','EVS_PARAM'), RULE_ID = GET_CODE_NO(#{ruleId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'14015172',#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'CODE'), UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: UPDATE EVS_AFFIRM_RULE SET UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = 2 WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
